evidence_summary: Round-232 stays inside the selected milestone-3 Phase-4 boundary-hardening scope, retires the remaining presolution raw bridge by phase-indexing PresolutionState, PresolutionM, MonadPresolution, and StateAccess, keeps computePresolution on Constraint 'Acyclic while emitting Constraint 'Presolved, leaves solve/backend and src-public surfaces untouched, adds focused raw-bridge regression guards, and passes git diff --check plus cabal build all && cabal test with 2567 examples and 0 failures. The integrated milestone-3 completion signal is now satisfied, so closeout may remain status-only and move milestone-3 from pending to done.
